steps: Enter a message expressing anxiety or emotional distress
tests.expected_result: The system returns an empathetic and supportive response within 2 seconds.

tests.scenario: Safe response to negative emotional input
steps: Enter a message expressing hopelessness or negative thoughts
tests.expected_result: The system provides a supportive response that does not worsen the user's emotional state.
At least one guided CBT exercise is displayed with actionable steps.
The CBT exercise is presented clearly from start to finish.

tests.scenario: Open breathing exercise from main interface
steps: Navigate to the wellness tools area
tests.expected_result: The breathing exercise starts successfully.

tests.scenario: Open meditation exercise from main interface
steps: Navigate to the wellness tools area
tests.expected_result: The meditation exercise starts successfully and remains accessible.

steps: Log in as a returning user
Continue the conversation with a follow-up message
tests.expected_result: The system references relevant context from the earlier conversation.

steps: Complete a conversation about stress management
Ask the chatbot a follow-up question on the same topic
tests.expected_result: The chatbot maintains continuity by recognizing the previous topic.

tests.scenario: Different emotional prompts receive different responses
steps: Submit a separate message about loneliness
tests.expected_result: The system generates context-specific responses that are not duplicated.
The response is relevant to the user's input and does not appear scripted or generic.
The interface labels appear in the selected language.

steps: Set the application to a supported non-English language
tests.expected_result: The chatbot responds in the selected language.

steps: Navigate through major actions in the interface
tests.expected_result: Major actions are readable and accessible through the screen-reader.

tests.scenario: Accessible navigation through key wellness features
steps: Navigate to the chat and wellness tools sections
tests.expected_result: The user can navigate to major features without accessibility barriers.

steps: Open the premium or subscription screen
tests.expected_result: Pricing and premium feature benefits are clearly displayed.
Each subscription option shows its cost and included features clearly.

tests.scenario: Start free trial with billing details shown
tests.expected_result: The cancellation date and billing start date are clearly visible.

steps: Open the free trial details page
tests.expected_result: Clear cancellation instructions are displayed before billing begins.

tests.scenario: Free-tier access to emotional support chat
steps: Log in as a non-premium user
tests.expected_result: The emotional support chat feature is accessible without premium access.

tests.scenario: Free-tier access to at least one wellness exercise
steps: Log in as a non-premium user
Navigate to the wellness tools section
tests.expected_result: At least one wellness exercise is accessible without premium access.
